历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were 16005 → 16537 → 14586 → 34935 → 26994. In 2024, due to Yunnan Province's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (3+1+2 model), the ranking system underwent structural changes, with the science group ranking dropping sharply from 14586 to 34935; in 2025, the physics category rebounded to 26994, indicating that after the initial fluctuation of the new exam, candidates' application positioning is gradually returning to normal. The university's enrollment plan for the science group (physics category) in Yunnan Province: 53 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 52 in 2025, and 46 in 2026, a decrease of 6 compared to 2025, a reduction of about 11.5%, and the tightening of quotas will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Rankings have been steadily rising: 135th in 2021 → 125th in 2022 → 109th in 2023 → 95th in 2024 → 86th in 2025 → 85th in 2026, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength, which has a positive effect on attracting candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a recruitment announcement that caused public opinion backlash; the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, which may have a certain negative impact on application enthusiasm. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (rated as average), with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no obvious signs of heating up. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Plant Production category (Agronomy, Horticulture, Plant Protection, Tea Science, Tobacco) in the enrollment majors, providing some support for applications in agriculture and forestry-related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics are relatively popular, Civil Engineering and Architecture are differentiated and wait-and-see, while Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,700), with an estimated 229,400 physics category candidates, a significant increase, intensifying overall competition. Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province, geographically adjacent to Yunnan Province, with similar climate and culture, providing a natural geographical advantage for Yunnan candidates. The university's enrollment plan for the physics category in Yunnan Province is 46, which is a medium-to-large scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the enrollment reduction of about 11.5%, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of local candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation: the reduction in quotas and the expansion of the candidate pool both intensify competition, pushing the ranking forward (decreasing the number); the rise in the university's ranking provides a positive pull, partially offsetting the effect of the reduction. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will be about 25,325, with a range of 24,825 to 25,825.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 贵州大学医学类在云南省2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为：2021年15351名（计划3人，仅护理学）、2022年14999名（计划3人，仅护理学）、2023年27716名（计划5人，新增医 学检验技术）、2024年27168名（计划5人）、2025年21389名（计划6人，护理学与医学检验技术各3人）。2023年因扩招2人且新增专业，位次大幅下滑至27716；2024年基本持平 于27168；2025年进一步回升至21389，显示医学类专业热度回升。2026年招生计划维持6人不变（护理学3人、医学检验技术3人），计划无扩缩变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 贵州大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，同时入选国家双一流建设高校，在西南地区具有较高的综合声誉。作为贵州省唯一的211大学，其医学类专业虽非传统强势医科，但依托 学校整体平台，在云南省仍具备一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来医学类专业报考热度持续走高，护理学与医学检验技术均为就业导向明确的实用型专业。贵州大学地处邻省贵阳，地理位置对云南考生具有较好的接受度，交通便利，文 化相近。云南省内医学类招生规模有限，贵州大学作为省外211高校，其医学类计划仅6人，竞争相对集中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，预测2026年贵州大学医学类在云南省最低录取位次约为21189名，波动区间预计在20977至21401名之间。位次较2025年略有上升（位次数字减小），反映医学报考 热度持续及近年位次回升趋势延续。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Guizhou University's medical programs in Yunnan Province from 2021 to 2025 are: 2021: 15,351 (plan: 3, only Nursing), 2022: 14,999 (plan: 3, only Nursing), 2023: 27,716 (plan: 5, new Medical Laboratory Technology added), 2024: 27,168 (plan: 5), 2025: 21,389 (plan: 6, Nursing and Medical Laboratory Technology each 3). In 2023, due to an expansion of 2 students and a new major, the ranking dropped sharply to 27,716; 2024 remained roughly stable at 27,168; 2025 further recovered to 21,389, indicating a rebound in popularity of medical programs. The 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged at 6 (Nursing 3, Medical Laboratory Technology 3), with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a key national university under Project 211 and has been selected as a national Double First-Class university, enjoying high comprehensive reputation in the Southwest region. As the only 211 university in Guizhou Province, its medical programs, though not traditionally strong in medicine, still hold certain appeal in Yunnan Province due to the overall platform of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has been continuously rising. Nursing and Medical Laboratory Technology are both practical majors with clear employment orientation. Guizhou University is located in neighboring Guiyang, which has good acceptance among Yunnan candidates due to convenient transportation and similar culture. The enrollment scale for medical programs within Yunnan Province is limited, and as an out-of-province 211 university, Guizhou University's medical programs have only 6 slots, making competition relatively concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Guizhou University's medical programs in Yunnan Province in 2026 is approximately 21,189, with a fluctuation range expected between 20,977 and 21,401. The ranking is slightly higher than in 2025 (smaller ranking number), reflecting the sustained popularity of medical applications and the continuation of the recent upward trend in rankings.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to prioritize Nursing as the main choice, with Medical Laboratory Technology as a reach target.
